name: Sensational Brownie
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 9 x 13-inch pan.
2 In a large bowl, stir together butter, sugar, and vanilla extract with a spoon or wire whisk.
3 Add eggs; stir until well blended.
4 Stir in flour, cocoa, baking powder, and salt until combined.
5 Reserve 2 cups of batter.
6 Spread remaining batter into the bottom of the baking pan.
7 Arrange mint patties in a single layer about 1/2 inch apart on top of the batter.
8 Spread reserved batter over the top.
9 Bake for 50 to 55 minutes or until brownies start to pull away from the edge of the pan.
10 Cool completely in the pan, then cut into squares. Makes about 36 brownies.
